extendedQueries.sql: SELECT organizations.id, organizations.name, organizations.slug, organizations.plan, organizations.settings, organizations."createdAt", organizations."updatedAt" FROM organizations organizations ORDER BY organizations.id ASC LIMIT ?

prismaQueries.sql: SELECT `main`.`organizations`.`id`, `main`.`organizations`.`name`, `main`.`organizations`.`slug`, `main`.`organizations`.`plan`, `main`.`organizations`.`settings`, `main`.`organizations`.`createdAt`, `main`.`organizations`.`updatedAt` FROM `main`.`organizations` WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY `main`.`organizations`.`id` ASC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

SELECT `main`.`projects`.`id`, `main`.`projects`.`name`, `main`.`projects`.`description`, `main`.`projects`.`color`, `main`.`projects`.`status`, `main`.`projects`.`isPublic`, `main`.`projects`.`budget`, `main`.`projects`.`startDate`, `main`.`projects`.`endDate`, `main`.`projects`.`metadata`, `main`.`projects`.`createdAt`, `main`.`projects`.`updatedAt`, `main`.`projects`.`organizationId` FROM `main`.`projects` WHERE `main`.`projects`.`organizationId` IN (?,?) ORDER BY `main`.`projects`.`id` ASC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

SELECT `main`.`tasks`.`id`, `main`.`tasks`.`title`, `main`.`tasks`.`description`, `main`.`tasks`.`status`, `main`.`tasks`.`priority`, `main`.`tasks`.`position`, `main`.`tasks`.`dueDate`, `main`.`tasks`.`completedAt`, `main`.`tasks`.`estimatedHours`, `main`.`tasks`.`metadata`, `main`.`tasks`.`createdAt`, `main`.`tasks`.`updatedAt`, `main`.`tasks`.`projectId`, `main`.`tasks`.`assigneeId`, `main`.`tasks`.`creatorId`, `main`.`tasks`.`milestoneId`, `main`.`tasks`.`parentId` FROM `main`.`tasks` WHERE `main`.`tasks`.`projectId` IN (?,?,?,?) ORDER BY `main`.`tasks`.`id` ASC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

SELECT `main`.`comments`.`id`, `main`.`comments`.`content`, `main`.`comments`.`isEdited`, `main`.`comments`.`createdAt`, `main`.`comments`.`updatedAt`, `main`.`comments`.`taskId`, `main`.`comments`.`authorId`, `main`.`comments`.`parentId` FROM `main`.`comments` WHERE `main`.`comments`.`taskId` IN (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) ORDER BY `main`.`comments`.`id` ASC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

SELECT `main`.`reactions`.`id`, `main`.`reactions`.`emoji`, `main`.`reactions`.`createdAt`, `main`.`reactions`.`commentId` FROM `main`.`reactions` WHERE `main`.`reactions`.`commentId` IN (?,?,?,?,?,?) LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
